Name: Simple Moving Average
Description: Arithmetic mean of price over the window.

Name: Exponential Moving Average
Description: Exponentially weighted moving average (more weight on recent bars).

Name: Weighted Moving Average
Description: Linearly weighted moving average (weight increases toward the latest bar).

Name: Double Exponential Moving Average
Description: Reduced-lag MA: 2*EMA - EMA(EMA).

Name: Triple Exponential Moving Average
Description: Further reduced-lag MA: 3*EMA - 3*EMA(EMA) + EMA(EMA(EMA)).

Name: Bollinger Bands
Description: Middle MA plus upper/lower bands set N standard deviations away.

Name: Relative Strength Index
Description: Wilder momentum oscillator of average gains vs losses (0-100).

Name: Moving Average Convergence/Divergence
Description: Fast EMA minus slow EMA with a signal line and histogram.

Name: Stochastic
Inputs: high, low, close, fastk=5, slowk=3, slowd=3
Description: Smoothed %K/%D showing close position within the recent range (0-100).

Name: Stochastic Fast
Description: Unsmoothed (fast) stochastic %K/%D.

Name: Stochastic RSI
Description: Stochastic formula applied to RSI values instead of price.

Name: Williams' %R
Description: Close position within the range scaled 0 to -100 (inverse stochastic).

Name: Average Directional Movement Index
Description: Trend strength regardless of direction (0-100).

Name: Directional Movement Index
Description: Raw directional index before ADX smoothing.

Name: Average True Range
Description: Wilder-smoothed true range; a volatility measure in price units.

Name: Normalized Average True Range
Description: ATR expressed as a percentage of the close.

Name: True Range
Description: Per-bar true range (max of the three high/low/prev-close spans); unsmoothed.

Name: Triangular Moving Average
Description: Double-smoothed (triangular weighted) MA emphasising the middle of the window.

Name: Kaufman Adaptive Moving Average
Description: MA that speeds up in trends and slows in noise via an efficiency ratio.

Name: MESA Adaptive Moving Average
Description: Adaptive MA based on Hilbert transform; outputs MAMA and FAMA lines.

Name: Triple Exponential MA (T3 / Tillson)
Description: Tillson smoother with very low lag and little overshoot.

Name: Moving Average (generic)
Description: Dispatches to any MA type selected by the matype parameter.

Name: Moving Average with Variable Period
Description: MA whose averaging period varies per bar from a periods array.

Name: MidPoint over period
Description: (highest + lowest close) / 2 over the window.

Name: Midpoint Price over period
Description: (highest high + lowest low) / 2 over the window.

Name: Parabolic SAR
Description: Trailing stop-and-reverse dots that flip with the trend.

Name: Parabolic SAR - Extended
Description: SAR with extra controls for start value

Name: Hilbert Transform - Instantaneous Trendline
Description: Smoothed near-zero-lag trendline derived from the Hilbert transform.

Name: MACD with controllable MA type
Description: MACD allowing each moving average's type to be chosen.

Name: MACD Fix 12/26
Description: MACD with fixed 12/26 periods; only the signal period is configurable.

Name: Commodity Channel Index
Description: Deviation of typical price from its average / mean deviation.

Name: Chande Momentum Oscillator
Description: Net momentum from sum of gains vs losses (-100 to 100).

Name: Momentum
Description: Price minus price N bars ago (absolute change).

Name: Rate of Change
Description: Percentage change over N bars: (c/cN - 1) * 100.

Name: Rate of Change Percentage
Description: Fractional change over N bars: (c - cN)/cN.

Name: Rate of Change Ratio
Description: Price ratio over N bars: c/cN.

Name: Rate of Change Ratio (100 scale)
Description: Price ratio over N bars times 100: (c/cN)*100.

Name: 1-day ROC of Triple Smooth EMA
Description: Rate of change of a triple-smoothed EMA; oscillates around zero.

Name: Percentage Price Oscillator
Description: MACD expressed as a percentage of the slow MA.

Name: Absolute Price Oscillator
Description: Absolute difference between a fast and slow MA.

Name: Average Directional Movement Index Rating
Description: Smoothed ADX: average of ADX now and N bars ago.

Name: Plus Directional Indicator
Description: Strength of upward directional movement (+DI).

Name: Minus Directional Indicator
Description: Strength of downward directional movement (-DI).

Name: Plus Directional Movement
Description: Raw upward directional movement (+DM).

Name: Minus Directional Movement
Description: Raw downward directional movement (-DM).

Name: Aroon
Description: Aroon up/down: how recently the highest high / lowest low occurred.

Name: Aroon Oscillator
Description: Aroon up minus Aroon down (-100 to 100).

Name: Money Flow Index
Description: Volume-weighted RSI of money flow (0-100).

Name: Balance Of Power
Description: (close-open)/(high-low): buying vs selling pressure per bar.

Name: Ultimate Oscillator
Inputs: high, low, close, p1=7, p2=14, p3=28
Description: Weighted momentum blended across three timeframes (0-100).

Name: On Balance Volume
Description: Running volume total added on up bars and subtracted on down bars.

Name: Chaikin A/D Line
Description: Cumulative accumulation/distribution money-flow volume.

Name: Chaikin A/D Oscillator
Inputs: high, low, close, volume, fast=3, slow=10
Description: Difference of fast and slow EMAs of the A/D line.

Name: Average Price
Description: (open + high + low + close) / 4.

Name: Median Price
Description: (high + low) / 2.

Name: Typical Price
Description: (high + low + close) / 3.

Name: Weighted Close Price
Description: (high + low + 2*close) / 4.

Name: Standard Deviation
Description: Rolling standard deviation over the window.

Name: Variance
Description: Rolling variance over the window.

Name: Beta
Description: Slope of one series' returns against another (volatility beta).

Name: Pearson's Correlation Coefficient (r)
Description: Rolling Pearson correlation between two series.

Name: Linear Regression
Description: Endpoint value of the rolling linear-regression line.

Name: Linear Regression Slope
Description: Slope of the rolling regression line.

Name: Linear Regression Angle
Description: Angle in degrees of the rolling regression line.

Name: Linear Regression Intercept
Description: Intercept of the rolling regression line.

Name: Time Series Forecast
Description: Linear-regression forecast (extrapolated endpoint) value.

Name: Hilbert Transform - Dominant Cycle Period
Description: Estimated length of the dominant price cycle.

Name: Hilbert Transform - Dominant Cycle Phase
Description: Phase angle of the dominant price cycle.

Name: Hilbert Transform - Phasor Components
Description: In-phase and quadrature components of the cycle.

Name: Hilbert Transform - SineWave
Description: Sine and lead-sine waves marking cycle turning points.

Name: Hilbert Transform - Trend vs Cycle Mode
Description: Flags whether the market is trending (1) or cycling (0).

Name: Lowest value over period
Description: Rolling minimum over the window.

Name: Highest value over period
Description: Rolling maximum over the window.

Name: Index of lowest value over period
Description: Bar index/offset of the rolling minimum.

Name: Index of highest value over period
Description: Bar index/offset of the rolling maximum.

Name: Lowest and highest values over period
Description: Rolling minimum and maximum together.

Name: Indexes of lowest and highest values
Description: Indexes of the rolling minimum and maximum.

Name: Summation over period
Description: Rolling sum over the window.

Name: Vector Arithmetic Add
Description: Element-wise addition of two series.

Name: Vector Arithmetic Subtraction
Description: Element-wise subtraction of two series.

Name: Vector Arithmetic Multiply
Description: Element-wise multiplication of two series.

Name: Vector Arithmetic Divide
Description: Element-wise division of two series.

Name: Vector Trigonometric ACos
Description: Element-wise arccosine.

Name: Vector Trigonometric ASin
Description: Element-wise arcsine.

Name: Vector Trigonometric ATan
Description: Element-wise arctangent.

Name: Vector Trigonometric Cos
Description: Element-wise cosine.

Name: Vector Trigonometric Sin
Description: Element-wise sine.

Name: Vector Trigonometric Tan
Description: Element-wise tangent.

Name: Vector Hyperbolic Cos
Description: Element-wise hyperbolic cosine.

Name: Vector Hyperbolic Sin
Description: Element-wise hyperbolic sine.

Name: Vector Hyperbolic Tan
Description: Element-wise hyperbolic tangent.

Name: Vector Ceil
Description: Round each value up to the nearest integer.

Name: Vector Floor
Description: Round each value down to the nearest integer.

Name: Vector Arithmetic Exp
Description: Element-wise e^x.

Name: Vector Log Natural
Description: Element-wise natural logarithm.

Name: Vector Log10
Description: Element-wise base-10 logarithm.

Name: Vector Square Root
Description: Element-wise square root.

Name: Two Crows
Description: Bearish reversal: two black candles after an up gap.

Name: Three Black Crows
Description: Bearish reversal: three long declining black candles.

Name: Three Inside Up/Down
Description: Harami confirmed by a third candle in the reversal direction.

Name: Three-Line Strike
Description: Three trend candles reversed by a fourth engulfing candle.

Name: Three Outside Up/Down
Description: Engulfing pattern confirmed by a third candle.

Name: Three Stars In The South
Description: Rare bullish reversal of three shrinking candles.

Name: Three Advancing White Soldiers
Description: Bullish reversal: three long rising white candles.

Name: Abandoned Baby
Description: Reversal with a gapped doji isolating a star candle.

Name: Advance Block
Description: Bearish: three rising candles with weakening bodies.

Name: Belt-hold
Description: Single long candle opening at its extreme with no shadow that side.

Name: Breakaway
Description: Five-candle pattern breaking away from the prevailing trend.

Name: Closing Marubozu
Description: Candle with no shadow on its closing end.

Name: Concealing Baby Swallow
Description: Rare bullish reversal made of four black candles.

Name: Counterattack
Description: Opposite-color candles closing at the same level.

Name: Dark Cloud Cover
Description: Bearish reversal: black candle closing into the prior white body.

Name: Doji
Description: Open and close nearly equal; market indecision.

Name: Doji Star
Description: Doji gapping away from the prior body; possible reversal.

Name: Dragonfly Doji
Description: Doji with a long lower shadow; bullish hint.

Name: Engulfing Pattern
Description: Candle whose body fully engulfs the previous candle's body.

Name: Evening Doji Star
Description: Bearish top reversal with a doji as the star.

Name: Evening Star
Description: Bearish three-candle top reversal.

Name: Up/Down-gap side-by-side white lines
Description: Continuation with twin gapped white candles.

Name: Gravestone Doji
Description: Doji with a long upper shadow; bearish hint.

Name: Hammer
Description: Bullish reversal: small body with a long lower shadow at a bottom.

Name: Hanging Man
Description: Bearish reversal: hammer shape appearing at a top.

Name: Harami
Description: Small body contained within the prior large body.

Name: Harami Cross
Description: Harami where the second candle is a doji.

Name: High-Wave Candle
Description: Long shadows with a small body; high-volatility indecision.

Name: Hikkake Pattern
Description: Inside-bar false-breakout trap.

Name: Modified Hikkake Pattern
Description: Hikkake variant with stricter context confirmation.

Name: Homing Pigeon
Description: Bullish harami-like two-candle reversal.

Name: Identical Three Crows
Description: Bearish: three black candles each opening at the prior close.

Name: In-Neck Pattern
Description: Bearish continuation; close just into the prior body.

Name: Inverted Hammer
Description: Bullish reversal with a long upper shadow at a bottom.

Name: Kicking
Description: Strong reversal between two opposite marubozu separated by a gap.

Name: Kicking - by Length
Description: Kicking pattern with direction decided by the longer marubozu.

Name: Ladder Bottom
Description: Bullish reversal after five declining candles.

Name: Long Legged Doji
Description: Doji with long upper and lower shadows.

Name: Long Line Candle
Description: A single long-bodied candle.

Name: Marubozu
Description: Candle with no shadows at all.

Name: Matching Low
Description: Two candles with identical lows; bullish support.

Name: Mat Hold
Description: Bullish continuation after a shallow pullback.

Name: Morning Doji Star
Description: Bullish bottom reversal with a doji as the star.

Name: Morning Star
Description: Bullish three-candle bottom reversal.

Name: On-Neck Pattern
Description: Bearish continuation; close at the prior low.

Name: Piercing Pattern
Description: Bullish reversal closing above the prior candle's midpoint.

Name: Rickshaw Man
Description: Long-legged doji with the body near the center.

Name: Rising/Falling Three Methods
Description: Continuation with three small counter-trend candles inside the trend.

Name: Separating Lines
Description: Continuation; candle opens at the prior open in trend direction.

Name: Shooting Star
Description: Bearish reversal with a long upper shadow at a top.

Name: Short Line Candle
Description: A single short-bodied candle.

Name: Spinning Top
Description: Small body with shadows on both sides; indecision.

Name: Stalled Pattern
Description: Bearish: rally losing momentum on the third candle.

Name: Stick Sandwich
Description: Bullish: two equal closes trapping an opposite candle.

Name: Takuri
Description: Dragonfly doji with an unusually long lower shadow.

Name: Tasuki Gap
Description: Continuation that only partially fills a prior gap.

Name: Thrusting Pattern
Description: Bearish continuation; close into the lower half of the prior body.

Name: Tristar Pattern
Description: Three dojis forming a reversal.

Name: Unique 3 River
Description: Rare bullish reversal bottom.

Name: Upside Gap Two Crows
Description: Bearish: two black candles following an up gap.

Name: Up/Down-gap Three Methods
Description: Continuation filling a gap over three candles.
